Title: MemorySmith.Agent — Sprint 40 P0 Implementation Status
Content:
Sprint 40 completed the P0/P1 fix package for the Mineflayer adapter:

## Completed P0 Items

### TSK-0061: Wire mineAborted/stopComplete to C#
Both events were ALREADY wired in the adapter (index.js sends them in 3 paths: stop check, goto catch, dig catch). C# side already parsed them via WebSocketBridge.ParseEvent and handled them in AgentBackgroundService.ProcessEventsAsync. Verified: no code change needed — events were already fully functional.

### TSK-0065: Fix off-by-one Y-level in gather-dirt
Root cause: bot.findBlock() uses Euclidean distance. When surface grass at Y=64 isn't dirt, the nearest dirt at Y=63 gets selected instead — bot digs one block too low.
Fix implemented via findBestBlock() with three-pass scoring:
- Pass 1: Blocks at expected Y-level (botFeetY - 1), sorted by XZ distance only
- Pass 2: Nearby Y-levels with scoring — Euclidean XZ distance + MINE_Y_PENALTY_WEIGHT (5) per Y-level offset
- Pass 3: Fallback — original findBlock behavior (any Y-level)

### Grass as dirt source
Added BLOCK_MINING_ALIASES map so mining "dirt" also matches "grass_block" (grass drops dirt when mined). The C# WorldStateProjector.BlockToItemDrop already mapped grass_block → dirt. All findBlocks/findBlock calls use array matching ([...acceptableIds]) for compatibility.

### Configurable constants
All block scoring magic numbers extracted to named constants at top of index.js:
- MINE_Y_PENALTY_WEIGHT = 5
- MINE_FIRST_PASS_COUNT = 10
- MINE_SECOND_PASS_COUNT = 20
- MAX_DIG_FAILURES = 3 (prevents infinite dig retry loops)

### TSK-0066: Verify kick→reconnect E2E
Already implemented with exponential backoff DefaultReconnectDelays = [2s, 4s, 8s, 16s, 32s]. KickedEvent handler cancels _connectionCts to force full reconnect. Test Reconnect_AfterTwoFailures_ResumesCurrentGoal validates the behavior.

### Stall retry graduated
Replaced single 60s stall timeout with graduated retry: [10, 20, 30, 60] seconds. Governor tracks _stallAttempt counter. On stall, agent now chats: "I'm stuck on {goal} — no progress detected. Waiting {N}s before retrying."

## Key Files Modified

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| MineflayerAdapter/index.js | findBestBlock(), BLOCK_MINING_ALIASES, digFailure Map, configurable constants |
| Agent.Core/ReplanGovernor.cs | Graduated delays [10,20,30,60], _stallAttempt, CurrentStallDelay |
| Agent.Core/IReplanGovernor.cs | CurrentStallDelay property added |
| WebUI.Blazor/AgentBackgroundService.cs | Chat notification on stall, graduated delay in stall log |
| Agent.World.Minecraft/WebSocketBridge.cs | Fixed pre-existing stub ReachableBlockFoundEvent parser |
| MemorySmith.Agent.Tests/*.cs | Updated constructor params, AlwaysStalledGovernor |

## Known Issues

1. bot.registry.blocksById doesn't exist in Mineflayer 4.x — use bot.registry.blocksByName for reverse lookups
2. findBlocks with function matching may cause issues in Mineflayer 4.x — use array matching [...acceptableIds] instead
3. The 'inv' and 'inventory' chat keywords are fast-pathed to status before reaching LLM — see Intent Parsing Issues memory
